themes.exampleQuote: a little bit of Paris in Pittsburgh
the seasonal La Ruche might be the best dessert I have ever had
This place was the find of Pittsburgh! Breakfast and lunch!
nut and chocolate croissants that were all fantastic

notable_quote: The seasonal La Ruche from La Gourmandine might be the best dessert I have ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers are drawn in by the specificity of the pastry program, citing the La Ruche, cinnamon rolls, and chocolate croissants by name, with the only friction being weekend crowds and occasional questions about whether a specific item is still available.
quarter_narrative: Nine Pittsburgh creators filed into La Gourmandine's Lawrenceville location this quarter, generating nearly 32,000 TikTok plays, while the bakery itself went 41 days without posting a single frame of its own product. That gap is not a minor footnote. The business sitting atop the Pittsburgh Bakeries family this issue, with 1,294 Google reviews and 779 tagged photos, is functionally invisible on the platform where its most enthusiastic visitors are spending their time. In the Pittsburgh Sweets family, Page's currently holds the momentum signal that La Gourmandine is leaving on the table. Closing that gap, specifically on Instagram and TikTok, is the clearest path from Ones to Watch toward the upper tiers.
tldr_read: Dominant review presence and strong creator attention, but the bakery's own Instagram has been silent for over 40 days. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Bakeries.
tldr_meaning: Every signal axis except Instagram momentum is at or above the family median, meaning the rank ceiling is not a product problem but a presence problem on the one channel where this quarter's energy is moving.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Bakeries On Review Depth Alone. The Bakery's Own Feed Went Quiet.

playbook.headline: Break the 41-day Instagram silence
playbook.action: Post at minimum twice weekly; the seasonal menu alone, La Ruche, pistachio items, supplies a ready visual archive of 779 existing photos to reactivate from.

playbook.headline: Acknowledge the nine creators already filming
playbook.action: Repost or respond to the 11 TikToks from this quarter; nine unique creators filmed without any prompt, a repost loop could extend that reach without new production.

playbook.headline: Surface the seasonal item calendar publicly
playbook.action: At least two reviewers asked about specific items by name, La Ruche and deluxe de pistache; a posted availability schedule converts that curiosity into foot traffic and reduces lost visits.
